sources.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown 1976
sources.description: The story of a hooded serial killer who terrorized the town of Texarkana in 1946 and was never caught. Based on one of America's most baffling murder cases.

metadata.Plot: The residents of 1946 Texarkana, Texas should be celebrating the return of their boys from WWII, but a mysterious hooded killer is stalking victims by night, murdering them in horrendous ways, and completely befuddling the local police force.
metadata.Actors: Ben Johnson, Andrew Prine, Dawn Wells
